design_philosophy: Authoritative, clear, function-first, with a high-end corporate blue/navy finish. Minimalist Control Room dashboard for scanning. High contrast for data legibility.

rules.tinting: Neutral greys are tinted with Blue (e.g., Slate/gray scale from Tailwind). Never use pure #000000.
rules.contrast: Maintain APCA standards. Interactive elements must have 3:1 ratio.
rules.hover_states: Always explicitly set hover text color (e.g., hover:bg-slate-800 hover:text-white).

spacing_and_layout.grid_strategy: MODE B: THE 'CONTROL ROOM' GRID for Dashboard. Tight gap (gap-4 or gap-6), strict data correlation, no jagged bottoms. Items must stretch (h-full).
spacing_and_layout.alignment: Left-align data and text. Only center empty states or hero text if needed.
spacing_and_layout.borders_and_radius: Subtle roundness. max 8px border-radius (rounded-md to rounded-lg). Go for a crisp, structural look.

surfaces.cards: Flat background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow by default. Hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surfaces.headers: Crystal Glassmorphism: bg-white/70 or bg-slate-900/70, backdrop-blur-xl, 1px bottom border. Must sit at z-50.
surfaces.chatbot_panel: Grid Borders/Technical look. High contrast, clean demarcations.
surfaces.modals: Flat solid surfaces with clear borders to avoid visual refraction.

components.strategy: Use Shadcn UI components. Strictly customize them to match the 8px max radius, structural typography, and tinted borders.
components.navigation: Collapsible left sidebar for global navigation. Top header for context/profile.
components.tables: Shadcn Table. Use alternating row colors or clear bottom borders for scanning. High contrast headers.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input, Form, Select. Left-align labels. Clear focus states (ring-2 ring-primary).
components.buttons: Limit primary color to main CTAs only. Secondary actions use outline or ghost variants. data-testid is MANDATORY.
components.charts: Shadcn Charts / Recharts. Use Line charts for trends, Donut charts for allocations. Stick to primary/accent blue palettes with success/warning colors.

motion.general: Minimalist micro-interactions. Quick transitions for feedback (e.g., transition-all duration-200 ease-in-out).
motion.hover: Subtle background shifts and border darkening.
motion.lists: Staggered entrance for transaction lists using Framer Motion.

icons.style: Regular or Duotone for dense dashboards.

bank_logo.description: Minimalist professional corporate bank logo, abstract geometric shape in deep navy blue.

login_background.description: High-end dark navy blue abstract architectural background for the login/registration screen.

ai_avatar.description: Professional AI virtual assistant avatar for the chatbot UI.

accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., data-testid='login-submit-button').
accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text over gradients/images uses text-shadow if needed. WCAG AA minimum.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS with the defined color variables.
Implement light/dark mode toggle utilizing the defined color palettes.
Structure the dashboard using the 'Control Room' grid layout.
Use the provided media URLs for the logo, login background, and AI chatbot avatar.
All forms and interactive UI should utilize heavily customized Shadcn components (max 8px radius).
Integrate Framer Motion for subtle staggered list entrances and hover states.
